headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Chase DeLauter leading the Rays' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. In other action, the Seattle Mariners took down the Minnesota Twins 5-3, with Cooper Criswell earning the win, and the Los Angeles Angels fell short in Chicago, with Mike Trout leading the Angels' offense with a home run and an RBI.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain. Other injured players include Casey Mize of the Detroit Tigers, Angel Zerpa of the Milwaukee Brewers, Jared Oliva of the San Francisco Giants, Garrett Crochet of the Boston Red Sox, Everson Pereira of the Chicago White Sox, Pete Fairbanks of the Miami Marlins, and Garrett Acton of the Minnesota Twins.

The Toronto Blue Jays made a roster move, trading 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash. The Seattle Mariners also made a trade, acquiring RHP Ty Cummings from the Tampa Bay Rays in exchange for RHP Casey Legumina. Additionally, the Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash, and the Texas Rangers traded C Willie MacIver to the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Fall to Guardians in 3-1 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Chase DeLauter leading the Rays' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Chicago White Sox, unable to overcome a late rally. Mike Trout led the Angels' offense with a home run and an RBI, but it wasn't enough to secure a win.

top_news.title: **Mariners Take Down Twins 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a 5-3 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Cooper Criswell earning the win. Taj Bradley led the Mariners' pitching effort, throwing 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Texas**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees suffered a 0-3 loss to the Texas Rangers, with Nathan Eovaldi earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place Javier Báez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers shortstop Javier Báez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right ankle sprain. The injury occurred on April 29, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays traded 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash on April 28, 2026.
